content:
saw fn panic(info: &core::panic::PanicInfo<'_>) -> ! {
in the kernel crate.
And ! never type is nightly-only experimental API in core crate. But why we not add #![feature(never_type)]?
https://doc.rust-lang.org/core/primitive.never.html
Using never as a return type is not experimental and has worked for years.
oh, just find that this is stable : the ! type can only appear in function return types .
! as "return type" to indicate a diverging function has been stable since long before ! was considered a type at all by rustc internally.
